features.featureTitle: In frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx, locate every hardcoded string or JSX text node that renders 'GrowthBridge Media' (including any partial matches such as 'GrowthBridge' or 'Growth Bridge Media') and replace each one with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA'. The navbar logo text visible in the top-left must read 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA' at all viewport sizes and in both the transparent and scrolled/opaque background states.

Perform a full-codebase audit of all frontend source files (index.html, App.tsx, Footer.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, AccessDeniedScreen.tsx, AdminDashboard.tsx, and any other .tsx/.ts/.html file under the frontend directory) and replace every remaining occurrence of 'GrowthBridge Media', 'GrowthBridge', or 'Growth Bridge Media' with 'HP BRIDGE MEDIA'. This includes but is not limited to: the <title> tag in index.html, footer logo text, copyright line, hero section text, and the access-denied screen.
